fields.label: Arcade API key
fields.helpText: From your Arcade dashboard -> Settings -> API keys

fields.label: Gateway URL
fields.helpText: Override the default Arcade MCP gateway URL. Leave blank unless you use a self-hosted Arcade instance.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates Arcade API key via the public health endpoint. Note: the Arcade health endpoint may evolve -- verify with https://docs.arcade.dev/ before relying on this connector for production personas.

metadata.summary: Arcade hosted MCP gateway providing thousands of enterprise-ready tools with managed OAuth and just-in-time authorization.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign up at arcade.dev and create an organization.
2. Go to Settings -> API keys and generate a new key.
3. Paste the key here. The default gateway URL (https://api.arcade.dev/v1/mcp) is correct for hosted Arcade.
4. Open the Arcade dashboard and configure which tools your organization exposes.
5. Attach this credential to a persona -- tool discovery will return every tool your Arcade org exposes.

Note: Arcade uses just-in-time OAuth for per-tool authorization. The underlying support in personas is scaffolded but not fully wired yet -- tools requiring fresh OAuth will currently fail until JIT auth runner integration ships. Tools that have already been authorized out-of-band work today.
